title: arabis decumbens
intro: Arabis decumbens, also known as Creeping Rock-cress, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the Brassicaceae family. The medicinal properties of Arabis decumbens include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of using Arabis decumbens include reducing inflammation, soothing skin irritations, and supporting respiratory health. The herbal preparations of Arabis decumbens include infusions, decoctions, and topical applications, which can be used to treat various ailments.
